channel.title: International Public History
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Public History

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: Public History as Graphic History
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-2014

item.title: The Graphic Anne: Anne Frank Comics as Transnational Lieu de Mémoire
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-2008

item.title: Illustrating History: April 25th in Portuguese Comics
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-2010

item.title: Teaching History Through Comic Books: Opportunities for Public & Visual History
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-2015

item.title: When Comics Become Part of a Thesis Project
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-2009

item.title: Making the Invisible and Private, Seen and Public: Roundtable Conversation on the Potentials of Graphic Medicine for Public History
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-2013

item.title: Graphic Collections and Resources
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-2011

item.title: The Tenses of Historical Consciousness: The Impact of Memory Work Within the Colombian Education Community
item.description: Article by Tatjana Louis, Mónika Contreras Saiz, Stefan Rinke DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/iph-2024-2012
